class.name: detector_yolo_gates::Plugin
class.description: Plugin to detect objects using YOLO inference

class.name: tracker_tf::Plugin
class.description: Plugin that tracks objects by reading their poses from the TF tree

class.name: pnp_pose::Plugin
class.description: Plugin that estimates per-object pose from keypoints using PnP

class.name: aruco::Plugin
class.description: Plugin that detects aruco and estimates pose from aruco pose
